mapper.select: SELECT EDOC_NM FROM NF_EDOC_INFO WHERE EDOC_CD = #{edocCd} WITH UR

SELECT EDOC_CD, EDOC_NM, EDOC_GBN, EDOC_PIC_GBN, REG_USERID, CLIP_FILE_PATH, OZ_FILE_PATH, LPC_SND_YN, EDMS_SND_YN, ORG_SND_YN, EMAIL_SND_MTHD, EDOC_SIGN_YN, EDOC_TSA_YN, UPD_DT, EDOC_CONTRACT_OFFER_YN FROM NF_EDOC_INFO WHERE EDOC_CD = #{edocCd} WITH UR
